assertion_results.evidence: The file contains '## Repository Registry' with table headers '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' followed by a separator line '|---|---|---|---|' and no data rows after it.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: The file contains '## Jira Configuration' with three bullet items: '- Project key: MYPROJ', '- Cloud ID: abc123', '- Feature issue type ID: 10001'.

assertion_results.evidence: The file contains '## Code Intelligence' followed by 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.' and a Limitations subsection stating 'No limitations known — no Serena instances configured.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: The discovery log states: 'Scanned all available MCP tools in the session. No Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools.'

Jira fields provided via manual entry: Project key=MYPROJ, Cloud ID=abc123, Feature issue type ID=10001.'

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: The discovery log states: 'The user was prompted about continuing without code intelligence. The skill asked whether to continue setup without Serena or set up Serena first. The user chose to continue without code intelligence.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: The file contains '## Bug Configuration' with three bullet items: '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: The discovery log confirms: 'Security Configuration opt-in was offered to the user. The user declined.' The claude-md-result.md file contains sections Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, and Bug Configuration only — there is no '## Security Configuration' section present.
